title: [GAM] Geologically accurate Minecraft
description: Vanilla like Resourcepack that gives Ores a more realistic Touch
body:
[![Requires Connected Textures](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/annhilati/devins-badges-extended/refs/heads/main/assets/cozy/requires/ctm_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) [![Consistent with Embrace Pixels](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/annhilati/devins-badges-extended/refs/heads/main/assets/cozy/consistent-with/embrace-pixels_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/embrace-pixels) [![Discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/social/discord-singular_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/Wwn3TvpMKu) Are you scientifically literate but have never been satisfied with how video games try to implement things from the fields you know? Then this pack is for you! Because I've fixed some mineralogical and geological nonsense in Minecraft!
Changes

Iron

  • Iron Ore -> Hematite Ore
  • Raw Iron -> Hematite

Copper

  • Copper Ore -> Malachite Ore
  • Raw Copper -> Malachite

Gold

  • Gold Ore -> Calaverite Ore
  • Raw Gold -> Calaverite

Lapis Lazuli

  • Lapis Lazuli Ore -> Lapis Lazuli
  • Lapis Lazuli (Block) -> Lasurite (Block)

Netherite

  • Ancient Debris -> Scheelite Ore
  • Netherite Scrap -> Wolfram

Minor Changes

  • Corrections to terminology of Amethyst items & blocks
  • Retextured Nether Quartz Ore
